'''Dragen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Justicars' Brigade]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]. In [[3643 BBY]], he conducted several interrogations of [[Rikael Lysannis]], a man suspected of ties with the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Everything said during questioning sessions was recorded and the holograms were stored in the [[Justicars' Tower]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} {{Hologram}}
